sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT WatermarkValue FROM dbo.watermark WHERE TableName = '@{item().name}'
SELECT MAX(@{item().watermarkCol}) AS newWatermark FROM @{item().name} WHERE @{item().watermarkCol} > @{variables('v_watermarkValue')}
